title: Stack trace disclosure
description: The response contains text that looks like a server-side exception, stack trace, or framework error.
evidence: Exception or stack-trace signature in response body.

matchers.pattern: \b(?:Traceback \(most recent call last\)|Stack trace|NullPointerException|TypeError:|ReferenceError:|SequelizeDatabaseError|PDOException|ORA-\d{4,5}|SQLITE_ERROR|MongoError|TemplateSyntaxError|Symfony\\Component|Laravel\\Framework|Django Version|Express error handler)\b

title: Debug or technology header exposure
description: The response exposes debug, runtime, or framework headers that may help fingerprint the application.

title: Sensitive token in URL
description: A request URL contains a parameter name commonly used for secrets or session material.

title: Private key disclosure
description: The response body contains a PEM private key marker.
evidence: Private key marker in response body.

title: Cloud access key disclosure
description: The response contains a value that resembles a cloud provider access key.
evidence: Cloud access key pattern in response body.

title: JWT token disclosure
description: The response contains a compact JWT-like value.

title: Environment file exposure
description: A captured response looks like a dotenv or environment configuration file.
evidence: Environment variable assignments in response body.

title: Git config exposure
description: A captured response appears to expose a Git repository config file.
evidence: Git config markers in response body.

title: Backup or archive file exposure
description: A successful response was returned for a path that looks like a backup, dump, or archive file.

title: Directory listing enabled
description: The response body resembles an auto-generated directory index.
evidence: Directory index markers in response body.

title: phpinfo exposure
description: The response appears to expose a PHP runtime information page.

title: Swagger or OpenAPI document exposure
description: The response appears to expose an API specification or Swagger UI.
evidence: OpenAPI or Swagger markers in response body.

title: GraphQL introspection data exposed
description: The response contains GraphQL introspection structures.
evidence: GraphQL introspection markers in response body.

title: GraphQL error disclosure
description: The response contains GraphQL error text that may reveal schema details.
evidence: GraphQL error markers in response body.

matchers.pattern: Cannot query field|Unknown argument|GraphQLError|Did you mean
